mapper.sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.contract_id, o.customer_id, o.order_amount, o.order_status, o.logistics_company, o.tracking_no, o.deliver_time, o.finish_time, o.confirm_time, o.receive_time, o.receive_person, o.cancel_reason, o.user_id, o.dept_id, o.del_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark, c.customer_name, ct.contract_no, u.nick_name as user_name, d.dept_name FROM mk_order o LEFT JOIN mk_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN mk_contract ct ON o.contract_id = ct.contract_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON o.dept_id = d.dept_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_order (order_no, contract_id, customer_id, order_amount, order_status, logistics_company, tracking_no, deliver_time, finish_time, confirm_time, receive_time, receive_person, cancel_reason, user_id, dept_id, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{contractId}, #{customerId}, #{orderAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{logisticsCompany}, #{trackingNo}, #{deliverTime}, #{finishTime}, #{confirmTime}, #{receiveTime}, #{receivePerson}, #{cancelReason}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})

INSERT INTO mk_order_item (order_id, line_no, product_name, product_spec, unit, quantity, unit_price, subtotal, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{lineNo}, #{productName}, #{productSpec}, #{unit}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{subtotal}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_order SET del_flag = '2' WHERE order_id IN #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_order SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, logistics_company = #{logisticsCompany}, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, deliver_time = #{deliverTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
